rationale: The citing paper is explicitly a rejoinder that “addresses commentaries on Hedgcock and Rao (2009)” and “reprises evidence from the prior fMRI study,” indicating the cited paper is the direct object of discussion rather than a background mention. Its stated relation to prior work is to refine interpretation of that earlier study’s findings (e.g., amygdala results, reverse inference, causality), so this pair is clearly substantive.
